text: Ushbu maqolada bugungi kunda oliy ta’lim muassasalarida tashkiliy-boshqaruv mexanizmlarini isloh qilish, tizimga zamonaviy tamoyillar hamda innovatsion yondashuvlarni joriy etish zaruriyati ilmiy jihatdan asoslab berilgan. Shuningdek, kadrlar tayyorlash va uzluksiz ta’lim jarayonida davlat va nodavlat ta’lim muassasalarining rivojlanish dinamikasi tahlil qilinib, ulardagi tarkibiy o‘zgarishlarni davlat tomonidan tartibga solishning ustuvor vazifalari yuzasidan mualliflik mulohazalari bayon etilgan.
explanation: The text is a polished, domain-specific abstract-like paragraph in Uzbek, with formal terminology common in academic writing. While plausible as human authorship, its concise generic structure also fits AI-generated text, so a moderate probability around 60% AI-generated.
